title: Ransomware: Volume shadow copy deletion detected
description: vssadmin.exe delete shadows /all detected on WORKSTATION-01. Typically used by ransomware to prevent file recovery.

title: Mimikatz credential dump on domain controller
description: LSASS memory access by mimikatz.exe detected on DC01. Credential material at risk.

title: Cobalt Strike beacon detected
description: Named pipe and Malleable C2 traffic consistent with Cobalt Strike beacon identified on WORKSTATION-03.

title: Lateral movement via PsExec
description: PsExec service installation detected on SRV02 from 10.0.1.15. Potential lateral movement.

title: Brute force login attempt — 50 failures in 5 minutes
description: 50 failed login attempts from IP 203.0.113.42 targeting user accounts in the last 5 minutes.

title: AWS CloudTrail logging disabled
description: StopLogging API call on trail 'prod-audit-trail' by user arn:aws:iam::123456:user/compromised-key.

title: Suspicious PowerShell encoded command
description: PowerShell invoked with -EncodedCommand containing a base64 payload. Decoded payload downloads from external IP.

title: Unauthorized SSH key added to root
description: New SSH public key added to /root/.ssh/authorized_keys on LNX01 by non-root user.

title: DLL sideloading via legitimate application
description: Unsigned DLL loaded by legitimate signed binary calc.exe in non-standard path C:\Users\Public\.

title: Data exfiltration over DNS tunneling
description: High-volume DNS TXT queries to suspicious domain exfil.badactor.xyz detected. Possible DNS tunneling exfiltration.
